name: wcb/cta-v2
title: CTA v2
description: A section block that displays a main title, a descriptive paragraph, and an optional secondary link at the top. Below this introduction, it features a repeatable set of call-to-action cards, arranged horizontally. Each card includes a title, description, and two distinct action buttons.
